name: Summer Couscous Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Mint, fresh and coarsely chopped
1/2 small Romaine lettuce head (washed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour half a cup of water into a medium-size non-stick skillet. Add onion and sauté over medium heat for 10 minutes. If the onion becomes too dry, add more water.
2. Bring three-quarters of a cup of water to a boil in a saucepan. Remove from heat and add couscous. Cover and let sit for 5 minutes.
3. Add carrots to the skillet with onions and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add zucchini and garlic, then cook for another 5 minutes.
5. Fluff the couscous with a fork in a bowl.
6. Add the onion mixture, raisins, and chickpeas to the couscous and toss well.
7. Mix together orange juice, olive oil, cayenne pepper, and cinnamon.
8. Add this mixture to the couscous and mix thoroughly.
9. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
10. Toss tomatoes and mint together.
11. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves on a serving platter or individual plates. Spoon the salad onto the lettuce. Sprinkle tomatoes and mint over the couscous salad.
12. Warm pita bread in an oven for 2 minutes, or until heated through.
